user.title: Connect Bosch Appliance
user.description: Enter your Bosch API credentials to set up the integration.

data_description.base_url: The base URL of the Bosch API (e.g. https://api.home-connect.com)
data_description.refresh_token: Your OAuth2 refresh token used to obtain access tokens

token.title: Verifying Credentials
token.description: Validating your credentials by fetching an access token. Please wait.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Bosch API. Check your API Base URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your Client ID and Refresh Token.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check your configuration and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Bosch account is already configured.
